name: Alchemist
instructions:
+2 Cards
+1 Action
At the start of Clean-up this turn, if you have a Potion in play, you may put this onto your deck.

name: Apothecary
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
Reveal the top 4 cards of your deck. Put the Coppers and Potions into your hand. Put the rest back in any order.

name: Apprentice
instructions:
+1 Action
Trash a card from your hand.
+1 Card per $1 it costs.
+2 Cards if it has P in its cost.

name: Familiar
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
Each other player gains a Curse.

name: Golem
instructions: Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal 2 Action cards other than Golems. Discard the other cards, then play the Action cards in either order.

name: Herbalist
instructions:
+1 Buy
+$1
Once this turn, when you discard a Treasure from play, you may put it onto your deck.

name: Philosopher's Stone
instructions: Count your deck and discard pile. +$1 per 5 cards total between them (round down).

name: Possession
instructions: The player to your left takes an extra turn after this one (but not a 2nd extra turn in a row), in which you can see all cards they can and make all decisions for them. Any cards or D they would gain on that turn, you gain instead; any cards of theirs that are trashed are set aside and put in their discard pile at end of turn.

name: Scrying Pool
instructions:
+1 Action
Each player (including you) reveals the top card of their deck and either discards it or puts it back, your choice. Then reveal cards from your deck until revealing one that isn't an Action. Put all of those revealed cards into your hand.

name: Transmute
instructions:
Trash a card from your hand. If it is an...
Action card, gain a Duchy
Treasure card, gain a Transmute
Victory card, gain a Gold

name: University
instructions:
+2 Actions
You may gain an Action card costing up to $5.

name: Vineyard
instructions: Worth 1 VP per 3 Action cards you have (rounded down).
